import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading and i < n
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(x)
          c = x
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_max_idx(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  let n = xs.len()
  mut best = 0
  mut best_val = 0
  match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    best_val = v
  when None
    best_val = 0
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > best_val
        best_val = v
        best = i
      end
    when None
      best = best
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if i == idx
      i = i + 1
    else
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        out = out
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  out
end

mut line1 = ""
mut line2 = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  line1 = s
when None
  line1 = ""
end
match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  line2 = s
when None
  line2 = ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
mut k = 0
match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  k = v
when None
  k = 0
end

let total = nums.len()
mut take = k
if take > total
  take = total
end

mut remaining = nums
mut out_line = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  let idx = find_max_idx(remaining)
  mut val = 0
  match remaining.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    val = v
  when None
    val = 0
  end
  if i == 0
    out_line = "#{val}"
  else
    out_line = "#{out_line} #{val}"
  end
  remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
  i = i + 1
end
println(out_line)
